title: USA BioEnergy Secures JM and Honeywell Technologies for New SAF Facility in Texas, USA
content: USA BioEnergy today announced it has selected Johnson Matthey (JM) and Honeywell to provide their industry-leading process technologies to USA BioEnergy to produce synthetic paraffinic kerosene (SPK) at its Bon Wier, Texas biorefinery. Once operational, the Bon Wier plant is expected to convert one million tons of biomass annually â€” using responsibly sourced forest thinnings as feedstock â€” into 65 million gallons of transportation fuels, including SAF.
author: Analysts Account
